raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California's 4.1 million small businesses represent 99.8% of business in California.",
    "In 2019, California's small businesses created 214,569 jobs and employed 7.2 million workers, which is nearly half of the state's total workforce.",
    "California routinely ranks as one of the worst places in the nation to do business due to burdensome regulations and expensive housing for employees.",
    "A survey from the Small Business Majority found that about 15% of surveyed businesses were facing permanent closure within three months.",
    "More than 20% of surveyed businesses indicated they would probably be forced to lay off workers.",
    "32% of surveyed businesses expected to cut employee hours."
  ]
}
```
